narrative_feed.event: RWA tokenization reaching consensus across 8 major sources

sources.name: Raoul Pal on The Journey Man
sources.quote: Tokenized treasuries are the gateway drug. Once institutions taste 24/7 settlement, there's no going back.

sources.name: Bankless w/ Larry Fink
sources.quote: We're tokenizing $10 billion this quarter alone. The efficiency gains are undeniable.

sources.name: What Bitcoin Did
sources.quote: Every asset will be tokenized. The question isn't if, it's which chain wins.

dissent.name: Arthur Hayes on Unchained
dissent.quote: Everyone's rushing into RWAs at the top. Real alpha is in pure crypto plays.

narrative_feed.event: Vitalik diverges from L2 scaling consensus, proposes L3 focus

contrarian.name: Vitalik on Bankless
contrarian.quote: L2s are becoming too centralized. The real scaling solution is app-specific L3s with shared security.

mainstream.name: Arbitrum team (multiple podcasts)
mainstream.quote: L2s are just getting started. We're seeing 100x cost reduction already.

mainstream.name: Polygon leadership on Empire
mainstream.quote: L2 dominance is inevitable. L3s add unnecessary complexity.

narrative_feed.event: Restaking yields mentioned 31 times as sustainable income source
narrative_feed.momentum: 31 mentions this week vs. 9 mentions last week (+244%)

narrative_feed.event: Major funds rotating from DeFi blue chips to RWA protocols
narrative_feed.impact: Aave, Compound seeing outflows. Ondo, Centrifuge seeing massive inflows.

narrative_feed.event: Bitcoin L2 thesis validated by Muneeb Ali, Eric Wall, Udi Wertheimer
narrative_feed.implications: 3 previously skeptical voices now building on Bitcoin. Stacks seeing 400% developer growth.

signals.insight: Institutional entry driving narrative. Yield farming out, treasury tokenization in.
Celestia's success proving modular thesis. Every L1 scrambling to modularize.
NFT projects pivoting to gaming. Ownership narrative evolving to utility.
Retail fatigue after 1000x plays disappeared. Smart money rotating to infrastructure.
Regulatory clarity making privacy tech investable again. ZK everything.
First working examples live. Truth Terminal has $300k treasury, trades autonomously.

signals.sources: EigenLayer, Babylon, Symbiotic all over $5B TVL
signals.insight: Native yields plus restaking rewards creating sustainable 15-25% APY.
Bitcoin DeFi TVL crossed $2B. The orange coin is waking up.
Perps volume 10x spot. Traders want leverage, not just swaps.
Users hate bridging. Winners will abstract chains entirely.

weekly_brief.collapsed_summary: RWA tokenization dominates [8 sources agree, led by Fink/Bankless, Pal/Journey Man] with institutions tokenizing billions monthly. Notable divergence: Vitalik challenges L2 consensus, proposes L3 focus. Blindspot: Privacy tech renaissance as regulations clarify.

consensus.detail: Tokenized treasuries offering instant settlement winning institutional adoption
